name: Crisp
tagline: From the all-in-one Crisp platform to a focused Clanker Support widget
intro: Crisp bundles chat, email, CRM, and a knowledge base. Clanker Support replaces the AI chat widget specifically. If you use Crisp's CRM or email marketing, keep those or find replacements — Clanker Support focuses on AI support with a model you control and optional self-hosting.
seoDescription: How to migrate from Crisp to Clanker Support: replace the AI chat widget and get model choice plus optional self-hosting, step by step.
quickSummary: Swap the Crisp loader for the Clanker Support script tag and re-enter your knowledge base. Route escalations to your team inbox and you're live.
oldEmbed:
<script type="text/javascript">
  window.$crisp = [];
  window.CRISP_WEBSITE_ID = "XXXXXXXX-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx";
  (function() {
    var d = document;
    var s = d.createElement("script");
    s.src = "https://client.crisp.chat/l.js";
    s.async = 1;
    d.getElementsByTagName("head")[0].appendChild(s);
  })();
</script>

steps.title: Create your Clanker Support project
steps.body: Sign up, create a project, and grab your public key. Set your brand color so the widget matches your site out of the box.

steps.title: Re-enter your knowledge base
steps.body: Copy your Crisp Helpdesk articles and any Hugo AI instructions into your Clanker Support knowledge base / system prompt. Start with the topics customers ask about most.

steps.title: Swap the loader script
steps.body: Remove the Crisp l.js loader and CRISP_WEBSITE_ID, then add the Clanker Support script tag. The widget loads in a shadow DOM so it won't pick up or leak page styles.

steps.title: Configure escalation and your notify email
steps.body: In project settings, set the escalation threshold (how many messages before the widget offers “Talk to a human” — an explicit ask surfaces it immediately) and the notify email where escalations should land. This is your team inbox or a shared support address. When a customer escalates, the full conversation arrives there with context intact.

steps.title: Set up email threading (optional)
steps.body: If you want customer email replies to thread back into the widget conversation, point an inbound domain at Clanker Support and set your inbound email local in project settings. Replies then flow both ways — your team answers from the inbox, the customer sees it in the widget. No separate helpdesk required.

steps.title: Test, then go live
steps.body: Open your site, start a test conversation, and trigger an escalation to confirm it reaches your inbox. Once it looks right, you're done — the widget is already live for every visitor.

mapping.to: Curated multi-provider catalog via LLM Gateway
Flat monthly plans — from $19/mo, no per-seat fees

transfers: Brand color and basic widget styling
doesntTransfer: Email marketing, campaigns, and push notifications
